400021512.headline: England see off DR Congo
400021512.summary: In a thrilling Round of 32 clash, England rallies to beat DR Congo 2-1. Brian Cipenga puts DR Congo ahead early, but Harry Kane strikes twice in the final 15 minutes to secure the victory. England advances to the next round, showcasing Kane's clutch performance.

400021513.headline: Paraguay win 4–3 on penalties
400021513.summary: In a thrilling Round of 32 clash, Paraguay's Julio Enciso opens the scoring at 42 minutes, but Germany's Kai Havertz equalizes just after halftime. The match goes to penalties, where Paraguay triumphs 4-3, sending them into the next round.

400021514.headline: Norway see off Ivory Coast
400021514.summary: Norway edges past Ivory Coast 2-1 in a thrilling Round of 32 clash at Dallas Stadium. Antonio Nusa opens the scoring, followed by Amad Diallo's equalizer, but Erling Haaland seals the victory late with a stunning goal. Norway advances to the next round, showcasing their resilience and talent.

400021515.headline: Egypt win 4–2 on penalties
400021515.summary: In a thrilling Round of 32 clash, Egypt takes an early lead with Emam Ashour's 13th-minute goal, but Australia equalizes through an own goal by Mohamed Hany in the 55th minute. The match goes to penalties, where Egypt triumphs 4-2, securing their place in the next round.

400021516.headline: Brazil see off Japan
400021516.summary: In a thrilling Round of 32 clash, Brazil edges Japan 2-1 in Houston. Kaishu Sano puts Japan ahead with a first-half strike, but Casemiro equalizes in the second half. Gabriel Martinelli seals Brazil's comeback with a dramatic stoppage-time winner, sending the five-time champions into the knockout stage.

400021517.headline: Colombia see off Ghana
400021517.summary: Colombia edges past Ghana 1-0 in a thrilling Round of 32 clash at Kansas City Stadium. Jhon Arias nets the decisive goal in the 14th minute, securing Colombia's spot in the knockout stages. The Colombian defense holds strong, denying Ghana any equalizer.

400021518.headline: Canada see off South Africa
400021518.summary: In a thrilling Round of 32 clash, Canada edges out South Africa 1-0 thanks to a dramatic last-minute goal from Stephen Eustaquio in the second minute of stoppage time. With this victory, Canada advances to the next round, keeping their World Cup dream alive.

400021519.headline: Spain see off Austria
400021519.summary: Spain dominates Austria 3-0 in the Round of 32, showcasing their offensive prowess. Mikel Oyarzabal nets a brace, scoring in the 36th and 89th minutes, while Pedro Porro adds another in the 66th. Spain advances to the knockout stage with a commanding performance.

400021520.headline: Mexico see off Ecuador
400021520.summary: Mexico dominates Ecuador 2-0 in the Round of 32, with Julian Quinones opening the scoring in the 22nd minute and Raul Jimenez adding to the lead just nine minutes later. Ecuador's Piero Hincapie receives a red card, leaving them a man down as Mexico advances to the next round with a commanding performance.

400021521.headline: Argentina see off Cape Verde
400021521.summary: Argentina edges past Cape Verde in a thrilling 3-2 knockout clash. Lionel Messi opens the scoring at 29', but Cape Verde equalizes with Deroy Duarte's strike in the second half. Late drama ensues with Lisandro Martinez's goal and an own goal by Diney Borges, sealing Argentina's victory and a spot in the next round.
400021521.fingerprint: ["Argentina","Cape Verde",3,2,[["29'","Lionel Messi","Argentina","home",false,false],["59'","Deroy Duarte","Cape Verde","away",false,false],["92'","Lisandro Martinez","Argentina","home",false,false],["103'","Sidny Lopes Cabral","Cape Verde","away",false,false],["111'","Diney Borges","Argentina","home",true,false]]]

400021522.headline: Morocco win 3–2 on penalties
400021522.summary: In a thrilling Round of 32 clash, Cody Gakpo puts the Netherlands ahead in the 72nd minute, but Issa Diop equalizes for Morocco in stoppage time. The match heads to penalties, where Morocco triumphs 3-2, advancing to the next round.

400021523.headline: France see off Sweden
400021523.summary: France dominates Sweden 3-0 in the Round of 32 at New York/New Jersey Stadium. Kylian Mbappe opens the scoring just before halftime and adds another in the second half, while Bradley Barcola finds the net in between. With this emphatic victory, France advances to the next round.

400021524.headline: United States see off Bosnia & Herzegovina
400021524.summary: The United States defeats Bosnia & Herzegovina 2-0 in the Round of 32, advancing to the next stage. Folarin Balogun opens the scoring just before halftime, while Malik Tillman seals the victory with a goal in the 82nd minute. Despite Balogun's red card, the US holds firm for the win.
400021524.fingerprint: ["United States","Bosnia & Herzegovina",2,0,[["45'","Folarin Balogun","United States","home",false,false],["82'","Malik Tillman","United States","home",false,false]]]

400021525.headline: Belgium see off Senegal
400021525.summary: Belgium edges out Senegal 3-2 in a thrilling Round of 32 clash in Seattle. Habib Diarra and Ismaila Sarr give Senegal an early lead, but Romelu Lukaku and Youri Tielemans strike late to secure Belgium's comeback. Belgium advances to the next round, showcasing resilience and firepower.

400021526.headline: Portugal see off Croatia
400021526.summary: In a thrilling Round of 32 clash, Portugal edges Croatia 2-1 in Toronto. Ivan Perisic puts Croatia ahead in the 53rd minute, but Goncalo Ramos delivers a dramatic equalizer in stoppage time at 90'+4'. Portugal advances to the next round, showcasing tenacity and skill in a nail-biting encounter.

400021527.headline: Switzerland see off Algeria
400021527.summary: Switzerland dominates Algeria 2-0 in the Round of 32 at BC Place, Vancouver. Breel Embolo opens the scoring in the 10th minute, followed by Dan Ndoye’s strike just after halftime. With this victory, Switzerland advances to the next round.

400021528.headline: Argentina see off Egypt
400021528.summary: Argentina rallies to defeat Egypt 3-2 in a thrilling Round of 16 clash at Atlanta Stadium. Yasser Ibrahim and Mostafa Zico score for Egypt, but Cristian Romero, Lionel Messi, and Enzo Fernandez strike back for Argentina, sealing their place in the quarterfinals. Egypt's Saafan Elsaghir receives a red card, adding to their woes.

400021529.headline: Spain see off Portugal
400021529.summary: Spain edges past Portugal with a dramatic last-minute goal from Mikel Merino in stoppage time, sealing a 1-0 victory in the Round of 16. The Iberian rivals clash fiercely, but Spain advances to the quarterfinals, showcasing their resilience and tactical prowess in Dallas Stadium.

400021530.headline: Morocco see off Canada
400021530.summary: Morocco dominates Canada with a commanding 3-0 victory in the Round of 16. Azzedine Ounahi shines, netting two goals in the second half at 50' and 82', while Soufiane Rahimi seals the win with a late strike in stoppage time. Morocco advances to the quarter-finals, showcasing a powerful performance.

400021531.headline: England see off Mexico
400021531.summary: England edges past Mexico 3-2 in a thrilling Round of 16 clash at the Mexico City Stadium. Jude Bellingham scores twice in quick succession before Julian Quinones pulls one back for Mexico. Despite Jarell Quansah's red card, England holds on to secure their spot in the quarter-finals.

400021532.headline: Norway see off Brazil
400021532.summary: Norway pulls off a stunning upset, defeating Brazil 2-1 in the Round of 16 at New York/New Jersey Stadium. Erling Haaland shines with a late brace, scoring in the 79th and 90th minutes to secure the victory. Norway advances to the quarter-finals, leaving Brazil stunned.

400021533.headline: France see off Paraguay
400021533.summary: France edges Paraguay 1-0 in a tense Round of 16 clash at Philadelphia Stadium, with Kylian Mbappé scoring the decisive goal. The French defense holds strong, ensuring their spot in the quarter-finals.

400021534.headline: Belgium see off United States
400021534.summary: Belgium dominates the United States 4-1 in the Round of 16, with Charles De Ketelaere netting twice early on. Malik Tillman briefly equalizes, but Belgium pulls away with goals from Hans Vanaken and Romelu Lukaku, sealing their spot in the quarterfinals.

400021535.headline: Switzerland win 4–3 on penalties
400021535.summary: Switzerland and Colombia battle to a tense 0-0 draw, pushing the match to penalties. Switzerland clinches victory, winning the shootout 4-3, and advances to the quarterfinals. A thrilling display of skill and nerve defines this knockout clash!

400021536.headline: France see off Morocco
400021536.summary: France dispatches Morocco 2-0 in the quarterfinals at Boston Stadium. Kylian Mbappe opens the scoring in the 60th minute, followed by Ousmane Dembele's strike just six minutes later. With this victory, France advances to the semifinals.

400021537.headline: Argentina see off Switzerland
400021537.summary: Argentina powers through to the semifinals with a 3-1 victory over Switzerland in Kansas City. Alexis Mac Allister opens the scoring early, while Dan Ndoye equalizes for Switzerland. Julian Alvarez and Lautaro Martinez seal the win in extra time, sending Argentina to the next round.

400021538.headline: Spain see off Belgium
400021538.summary: Spain edges past Belgium 2-1 in a thrilling quarterfinal at Los Angeles Stadium. Fabian Ruiz opens the scoring at 30 minutes, but Charles De Ketelaere equalizes just before halftime. Mikel Merino nets the winner in the 88th minute, sending Spain to the semifinals.

400021539.headline: England see off Norway
400021539.summary: In a thrilling quarterfinal clash, England edges past Norway 2-1 in Miami. Andreas Schjelderup opens the scoring for Norway, but Jude Bellingham strikes twice, equalizing just before halftime and netting the winner in stoppage time. England advances to the semifinals, showcasing Bellingham's brilliance on the world stage.

400021540.headline: Argentina see off England
400021540.summary: In a thrilling semifinal at Atlanta Stadium, Argentina edges past England 2-1. Anthony Gordon opens the scoring for England in the 55th minute, but Enzo Fernandez equalizes in the 85th before Lautaro Martinez clinches victory with a dramatic goal in stoppage time. Argentina advances to the final, showcasing their resilience and flair.

400021541.headline: Spain see off France
400021541.summary: In a thrilling semifinal at Dallas Stadium, Spain secures their spot in the World Cup final with a 2-0 victory over France. Pedro Porro opens the scoring in the 58th minute, followed by a late goal from Alvaro Morata. Spain's solid defense keeps the French attack at bay, sealing their advance.

400021542.headline: England see off France
400021542.summary: In a thrilling knockout match, England outlasts France 6-4 in Miami. Declan Rice, Ezri Konsa, and Bukayo Saka each net goals, with Saka scoring twice. Despite a late surge from Kylian Mbappe and Ousmane Dembele, England holds strong, advancing to the next round with an impressive victory.

400021543.headline: Spain see off Argentina
400021543.summary: In a thrilling knockout clash, Spain edges Argentina 1-0 in extra time, with Ferran Torres netting the decisive goal in the 106th minute. Spain advances to the next round, showcasing tactical brilliance and resilience against a formidable opponent.
